Business Model

B2B SaaS Subscription

Tiered pricing designed for hospitals of all sizes, ensuring accessible entry and scalable value.

Basic

For small nursing homes & clinics.
(< 50 Beds)

₹2,999 /mo
  • Digital Inventory Tracking
  • Basic Stock Dashboard
  • Manual Entry Support
  • Email Support
Replaces manual logbooks
Recommended

Pro

For mid-sized hospitals.
(50 - 200 Beds)

₹6,999 /mo
  • Real-time HMS Sync
  • Network Search & Discovery
  • Emergency Alert Broadcasting
  • Donor Notification Engine
  • Priority Phone Support
ROI: Prevents 2+ Surgery Delays

Enterprise

For large hospital chains & Govt.
(200+ Beds / Multi-site)

Custom
  • Full API Access & Integrations
  • Predictive Demand Analytics
  • Central Command Dashboard
  • Dedicated Account Manager
  • On-premise Deployment Option
Tailored for scale & compliance
